title: Greenlane Announces Over $2 Million in Orders for Biogas Desulfurization Equipment
content: Greenlane Renewables Inc., a leading global provider of biogas desulfurization and upgrading systems, today announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary Airdep S.r.l. has received new purchase orders totalling over $2 million (â‚¬1.3M). The purchases were made by a repeat customer for the supply of multiple units of proprietary biogas desulfurization equipment to support the production of renewable natural gas (â€œRNGâ€). Order fulfillment is expected to commence immediately.
author: Analysts Account
